subject: phone switch for Florida office
body:
Do you want me to have ETC order the phone switch for the other Florida
office?  The estimate for a 15 phone system is around 17k... however, if
it is an office system, and you figure voicemail for each phone the cost
could easily double.  Just let me know and I'll take care of it how you
like. 

 

Do you know the timeframe yet for the weekend you'd like us down there?
I'd like to see our contractors on site and near completion with the
phone system before that happens.  Also, a new office setup will involve
networking hardware and possibly cabling too.  We have a Sprint T1 in
hand right now.  I would need advanced notice to deploy that too.

 

Regarding the Citrix server upgrade and engaging consultants to engineer
this.  The total cost for two new servers, all software plus 250 hrs of
installation time is at 109,000 (not to exceed)  Between Bill and
working remote I don't think we would need them on site till the tale
end of the upgrade.  At that point reasonable travel/room/board would be
added to the cost.  

 

Please approve ordering:

New office phone switch 17k

Voicemail for office phone system additional 17k

Citrix upgrade 109k

 

I will need advanced notice to:

Schedule office phone installation

Schedule office T1

Purchase networking hardware

Have ETC review space to assess existing cabling and or install
additional cabling

Schedule weekend for Bill and I to fly to Florida

 

I will continue to work with Bill evenings and weekends to assist with
his transition and partner in making your IT the best that it can be.

Hope you are well,

Dave
body_html:
Do you want me to have ETC order the phone switch for the other Florida office?  The estimate for a 15 phone system is around 17k… however, if it is an office system, and you figure voicemail for each phone the cost could easily double.  Just let me know and I’ll take care of it how you like.

 

Do you know the timeframe yet for the weekend you’d like us down there?  I’d like to see our contractors on site and near completion with the phone system before that happens.  Also, a new office setup will involve networking hardware and possibly cabling too.  We have a Sprint T1 in hand right now.  I would need advanced notice to deploy that too.

 

Regarding the Citrix server upgrade and engaging consultants to engineer this.  The total cost for two new servers, all software plus 250 hrs of installation time is at 109,000 (not to exceed)  Between Bill and working remote I don’t think we would need them on site till the tale end of the upgrade.  At that point reasonable travel/room/board would be added to the cost. 

 

Please approve ordering:

New office phone switch 17k

Voicemail for office phone system additional 17k

Citrix upgrade 109k

 

I will need advanced notice to:

Schedule office phone installation

Schedule office T1

Purchase networking hardware

Have ETC review space to assess existing cabling and or install additional cabling

Schedule weekend for Bill and I to fly to Florida

 

I will continue to work with Bill evenings and weekends to assist with his transition and partner in making your IT the best that it can be.

Hope you are well,

Dave
